interfaces.name: TripContextSnapshot
interfaces.signature: struct TripContextSnapshot { let tripID: UUID; let destinationKey: String; let fallbackClimateZoneKey: String?; let startDate: Date; let endDate: Date; let resolvedMonth: Int; let tripType: TripType; let modifiers: TripModifiers; let status: TripStatus }
interfaces.notes: Pure value snapshot used as input to generation; no SwiftData types allowed.

interfaces.name: TripType
interfaces.signature: enum TripType: String, Codable, CaseIterable { case business, cityWeekend, beachWarm, coldWinter, outdoorHiking, familyKids }
interfaces.notes: Closed six-item taxonomy.

interfaces.name: TripStatus
interfaces.signature: enum TripStatus: String, Codable, CaseIterable { case planned, completed, didNotHappen }
interfaces.notes: Preferred over bare didHappen Bool because it closes invalid future migrations and keeps the cancellation path explicit.

interfaces.name: TripModifiers
interfaces.signature: struct TripModifiers: Equatable { let carryOnOnly: Bool; let laundryAccess: Bool }
interfaces.notes: Small stable input surface for generation rules.

interfaces.name: ClimateSummary
interfaces.signature: struct ClimateSummary: Codable, Equatable { let regionKey: String; let month: Int; let averageHighC: Double; let averageLowC: Double; let precipitationBand: PrecipitationBand; let copyLabel: String }
interfaces.notes: Historical average only; copyLabel should already contain compliant wording basis.

interfaces.name: PrecipitationBand
interfaces.signature: enum PrecipitationBand: String, Codable { case dry, moderate, wet }
interfaces.notes: Derived, not stored — computed from raw ClimateNormal for the engine's coarse decision rules.

interfaces.name: HistorySignalSnapshot
interfaces.signature: struct HistorySignalSnapshot: Codable, Equatable { let itemKey: String; let tripType: TripType?; let climateZoneKey: String?; let usageCount: Int; let unusedCount: Int; let manualAddCount: Int; let missingCount: Int; let lastReviewedAt: Date? }
interfaces.notes: Derived from reviewed trips only; input to weighting engine.

interfaces.name: PackingListArtifact
interfaces.signature: struct PackingListArtifact: Codable, Equatable { let tripID: UUID; let generatedAt: Date; let algorithmVersion: String; let sections: [PackingSectionArtifact]; let climateSummary: ClimateSummary; let isHistoryInfluenced: Bool }
interfaces.notes: Frozen generated snapshot persisted and rendered directly by UI.

interfaces.name: PackingSectionArtifact
interfaces.signature: struct PackingSectionArtifact: Codable, Equatable, Identifiable { let id: UUID; let title: String; let items: [PackingItemArtifact] }
interfaces.notes: Section grouping for checklist UI and export.

interfaces.name: PackingItemArtifact
interfaces.signature: struct PackingItemArtifact: Codable, Equatable, Identifiable { let id: UUID; let stableItemKey: String; let displayName: String; let quantity: Int; let source: PackingItemSource; let isChecked: Bool; let reason: SuggestionReason; let isChangedFromPreviousGeneration: Bool; let sortOrder: Int }
interfaces.notes: Reason and changed flag are frozen at generation/regeneration time.

interfaces.name: PackingItemSource
interfaces.signature: enum PackingItemSource: String, Codable { case suggested, custom }
interfaces.notes: Used for accessibility and UI distinction.

interfaces.name: SuggestionReason
interfaces.signature: struct SuggestionReason: Codable, Equatable { let kind: SuggestionReasonKind; let message: String; let evidenceCount: Int? }
interfaces.notes: Value-type shape produced by GenerationEngine, mapped onto PackingItem's reason fields at write time.

interfaces.name: SuggestionReasonKind
interfaces.signature: enum SuggestionReasonKind: String, Codable { case tripTypeDefault, climateDefault, repeatedManualAdd, reviewedHistoryPromoted, reviewedHistorySuppressed, quantityAdjusted }
interfaces.notes: Lets tests pin on reason category independent of exact wording.

interfaces.name: ReviewDraft
interfaces.signature: struct ReviewDraft: Equatable { let tripID: UUID; var unusedItemKeys: Set<String>; var missingFreeText: String; var markedDidNotHappen: Bool }
interfaces.notes: UI-facing mutable draft before submission.

interfaces.name: ReviewOutcomeSnapshot
interfaces.signature: struct ReviewOutcomeSnapshot: Codable, Equatable { let tripID: UUID; let reviewedAt: Date; let itemOutcomes: [ReviewedItemOutcome]; let missingFreeText: String; let didNotHappen: Bool }
interfaces.notes: Canonical submitted review payload used to rebuild learning history.

interfaces.name: ReviewedItemOutcome
interfaces.signature: struct ReviewedItemOutcome: Codable, Equatable { let stableItemKey: String; let outcome: ItemUsageOutcome }
interfaces.notes: Explicit review signal only; checklist checks are not usage truth.

interfaces.name: ItemUsageOutcome
interfaces.signature: enum ItemUsageOutcome: String, Codable { case used, unused, wishedPacked }
interfaces.notes: Supports future insight summaries without schema change.

interfaces.name: PackingListGenerating
interfaces.signature: protocol PackingListGenerating { func generate(trip: TripContextSnapshot, climate: ClimateSummary, history: [HistorySignalSnapshot], previous: PackingListArtifact?) -> PackingListArtifact }
interfaces.notes: Pure deterministic engine; no persistence or UI dependencies.

interfaces.name: LearningHistoryBuilding
interfaces.signature: protocol LearningHistoryBuilding { func buildHistorySignals(from reviews: [ReviewOutcomeSnapshot]) -> [HistorySignalSnapshot] }
interfaces.notes: Must support full deterministic recomputation after review edits.

interfaces.name: ClimateLookupProviding
interfaces.signature: protocol ClimateLookupProviding { func climateSummary(for destinationKey: String, fallbackClimateZoneKey: String?, startDate: Date, endDate: Date) throws -> ClimateSummary }
interfaces.notes: Owns majority-month resolution and fallback behavior.

interfaces.name: TripRepository
interfaces.signature: protocol TripRepository { func fetchSummaries() throws -> [TripSummary]; func fetchTrip(id: UUID) throws -> Trip; func upsert(_ draft: TripDraft) throws -> UUID; func deleteTrip(tripID: UUID) throws; func markTripDidNotHappen(tripID: UUID) throws }
interfaces.notes: SwiftData-backed storage boundary for trip lifecycle. markTripDidNotHappen sets didHappen=false, never deletes.

interfaces.name: TripDraft
interfaces.signature: struct TripDraft: Equatable { let tripID: UUID?; let destinationKey: String; let fallbackClimateZoneKey: String?; let startDate: Date; let endDate: Date; let tripType: TripType; let modifiers: TripModifiers }
interfaces.notes: Shared create/edit form payload.

interfaces.name: TripSummary
interfaces.signature: struct TripSummary: Identifiable, Equatable { let id: UUID; let destinationDisplayName: String; let dateRangeText: String; let tripType: TripType; let progress: Double; let isLockedByFreeTier: Bool; let phase: TripPhase }
interfaces.notes: Cheap list-facing projection; TripCard reads only this shape, never trip.items/trip.review.

interfaces.name: GeneratedListRepository
interfaces.signature: protocol GeneratedListRepository { func loadItems(tripID: UUID) throws -> [PackingItem]; func replaceSuggestedItems(tripID: UUID, items: [PackingItem]) throws; func toggleChecked(tripID: UUID, itemID: UUID, isChecked: Bool) throws; func upsertCustomItem(tripID: UUID, name: String, quantity: Int, category: PackingCategory) throws; func removeItem(tripID: UUID, itemID: UUID) throws }
interfaces.notes: Works against canonical PackingItem rows directly. toggleChecked must be a single targeted field write, not a full-list re-save — this is the perf-critical path during packing.

interfaces.name: CustomItemDraft
interfaces.signature: struct CustomItemDraft: Equatable { let itemID: UUID?; let displayName: String; let quantity: Int; let sectionTitle: String }
interfaces.notes: Flat custom item model only; no taxonomy expansion.

interfaces.name: ReviewRepository
interfaces.signature: protocol ReviewRepository { func loadReview(tripID: UUID) throws -> Review?; func saveReview(tripID: UUID, outcomes: [ReviewItemOutcome], wishIPacked: String?) throws }
interfaces.notes: Full-overwrite save semantics so review edits stay deterministic (never incremental patching).

interfaces.name: PackingCoordinator
interfaces.signature: protocol PackingCoordinator { func createTripAndGenerate(_ draft: TripDraft) async throws -> UUID; func regenerateList(for tripID: UUID) async throws; func submitReview(tripID: UUID, outcomes: [ReviewItemOutcome], wishIPacked: String?) async throws; func rebuildAllDerivedState() async throws }
interfaces.notes: Only cross-lane bridge between SwiftData models and the pure generator. async is call-site convenience only — internally these call the synchronous GenerationEngine.generate()/applyGenerationResult() on the main actor with no real suspension point. Never move generation to a background actor; the golden path must never show a spinner. rebuildAllDerivedState is required for edit recovery, migration repair, and QA verification.

interfaces.name: EntitlementSnapshot
interfaces.signature: struct EntitlementSnapshot: Equatable { let isPremiumActive: Bool; let activeProductID: String?; let lastVerifiedAt: Date?; let graceWindowEndsAt: Date? }
interfaces.notes: Single entitlement state surface for gating and offline grace behavior.

interfaces.name: EntitlementStoreProtocol
interfaces.signature: @MainActor protocol EntitlementStoreProtocol: AnyObject { var current: EntitlementSnapshot { get } func start() async; func refresh() async }
interfaces.notes: Long-lived StoreKit observer listening to Transaction.updates, never a one-shot launch check.

interfaces.name: HistoryAccessPolicy
interfaces.signature: func isTripAccessibleInFreeTier(sortedTrips: [TripSummary], tripID: UUID, entitlement: EntitlementSnapshot) -> Bool
interfaces.notes: Pure retained-window policy used by list and navigation gating.

interfaces.name: WidgetSnapshot
interfaces.signature: struct WidgetSnapshot: Codable, Equatable { let stableTripId: UUID?; let daysUntilTrip: Int?; let percentComplete: Double?; let hasPendingReview: Bool; let updatedAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: One file, dual target membership (main app + widget extension). Never contains destination text by construction.

interfaces.name: WidgetSnapshotPublishing
interfaces.signature: protocol WidgetSnapshotPublishing { func publish(_ snapshot: WidgetSnapshot) async }
interfaces.notes: Agreed by both.

interfaces.name: PendingNavigationIntent
interfaces.signature: enum PendingNavigationIntent: Equatable { case openTrip(UUID); case openReview(UUID); case openSettings; case openPaywall; case none }
interfaces.notes: Single app-root value resolved once per external trigger via DeepLinkRouter.

interfaces.name: ExportingPackingList
interfaces.signature: protocol ExportingPackingList { func exportPlainTextList(for tripID: UUID) throws -> URL }
interfaces.notes: Builds PackingItemSnapshot values on demand and strips all reasoning before writing the export file.

interfaces.name: AppError
interfaces.signature: enum AppError: Error, Equatable { case persistenceFailure(String); case climateDataMissing(String); case generationFailed; case entitlementUnavailable; case tripNotFound; case invalidTripDates; case notificationDenied }
interfaces.notes: Shared typed errors for reachable error states across UI and services.

interfaces.name: BuildVerificationChecklist
interfaces.signature: struct BuildVerificationChecklist { let verifiedCoreFlows: [String]; let unverifiableInHeadless: [String]; let knownLimitations: [String] }
interfaces.notes: Shared vocabulary for build verification and final review to report the same truth about what's actually working vs. flagged as a limitation.

interfaces.name: Trip
interfaces.signature: @Model final class Trip { var id: UUID; var destinationDisplayName: String; var regionOrZoneId: String?; var climateZoneFallbackId: String?; var startDate: Date; var endDate: Date; var tripType: TripType; var carryOnOnly: Bool; var laundryAccess: Bool; var didHappen: Bool; var createdAt: Date; var lastGeneratedAt: Date?; var generationAlgorithmVersion: Int?; @Relationship(deleteRule: .cascade) var items: [PackingItem]; @Relationship(deleteRule: .cascade) var review: Review? }
interfaces.notes: didHappen is the sole persisted lifecycle fact, default true, flipped only by the explicit 'didn't happen' action, never by the clock. No persisted TripStatus/planned/completed enum.

interfaces.name: PackingItem
interfaces.signature: @Model final class PackingItem { var id: UUID; var trip: Trip?; var name: String; var category: PackingCategory; var isCustom: Bool; var isChecked: Bool; var quantity: Int; var reasonKind: SuggestionReasonKind?; var reasonMessage: String?; var reasonEvidenceCount: Int?; var isRecentlyChanged: Bool; var sortOrder: Int }
interfaces.notes: Reason fields + isRecentlyChanged frozen at generation/regeneration time, applied in one write, never live-recomputed. isCustom rows never touched by regeneration diffing.

interfaces.name: Review
interfaces.signature: @Model final class Review { var id: UUID; var trip: Trip?; var completedAt: Date; var wishIPacked: String?; @Relationship(deleteRule: .cascade) var itemOutcomes: [ReviewItemOutcome] }
interfaces.notes: wishIPacked is a single free-text field disconnected from item identity — covers items never on the list at all.

interfaces.name: ReviewItemOutcome
interfaces.signature: @Model final class ReviewItemOutcome { var id: UUID; var review: Review?; var itemName: String; var category: PackingCategory; var wasUsed: Bool }
interfaces.notes: Plain Bool, not a 3-case enum. Only source of learning signal; packing checkmarks never write here.

interfaces.name: PackingCategory
interfaces.signature: enum PackingCategory: String, Codable, CaseIterable { case clothing, toiletries, electronics, documents, health, gear }
interfaces.notes: Closed checklist grouping set.

interfaces.name: ClimateNormal
interfaces.signature: struct ClimateNormal: Codable, Equatable { let regionOrZoneId: String; let month: Int; let averageHighC: Double; let averageLowC: Double; let averagePrecipitationMM: Double; let notes: String? }
interfaces.notes: Raw bundled data for climate-card display copy, always 'historical average', never forecast language.

interfaces.name: ClimateCatalog
interfaces.signature: protocol ClimateCatalog { func normal(for regionOrZoneId: String, month: Int) -> ClimateNormal?; func allRegions() -> [RegionCatalogEntry]; func allFallbackZones() -> [ClimateZoneFallbackEntry] }
interfaces.notes: Loaded once in-memory at launch; CI test asserts full 12-month coverage per region/fallback zone.

interfaces.name: RegionCatalogEntry
interfaces.signature: struct RegionCatalogEntry: Codable, Identifiable, Equatable { let id: String; let displayName: String; let climateZoneFallbackId: String }
interfaces.notes: ~30-40 bundled destinations.

interfaces.name: ClimateZoneFallbackEntry
interfaces.signature: struct ClimateZoneFallbackEntry: Codable, Identifiable, Equatable { let id: String; let displayName: String }
interfaces.notes: Inline fallback shown the instant destination search returns zero matches. Search itself is synchronous in-memory filtering — no debounce, no async, no loading state.

interfaces.name: monthOfMajorityDays
interfaces.signature: func monthOfMajorityDays(start: Date, end: Date, calendar: Calendar) -> Int
interfaces.notes: Deterministic month-boundary resolution for climate lookup.

interfaces.name: GenerationInput
interfaces.signature: struct GenerationInput: Equatable { let tripType: TripType; let month: Int; let regionOrZoneId: String; let tripLengthDays: Int; let carryOnOnly: Bool; let laundryAccess: Bool; let climate: [ClimateNormal]; let learningHistory: LearningHistorySnapshot }
interfaces.notes: Fully snapshotted value type; nothing here is a live SwiftData reference.

interfaces.name: GenerationResult
interfaces.signature: struct GenerationResult: Equatable { struct SuggestedItem: Equatable { let name: String; let category: PackingCategory; let quantity: Int; let reason: SuggestionReason }; let items: [SuggestedItem]; let algorithmVersion: Int }
interfaces.notes: Pure output; never persisted as its own artifact table — applyGenerationResult maps it directly onto PackingItem rows.

interfaces.name: GenerationEngine
interfaces.signature: protocol GenerationEngine { func generate(input: GenerationInput) -> GenerationResult }
interfaces.notes: MUST stay synchronous, non-async, non-actor-isolated. This is the rule that keeps trip creation/regeneration feeling instant — never wrap it in Task or move it to a background actor.

interfaces.name: LearningHistorySnapshot
interfaces.signature: struct LearningHistorySnapshot: Equatable { struct ItemEvidence: Equatable { let itemName: String; let category: PackingCategory; let usedCount: Int; let unusedCount: Int; let lastSeenDate: Date }; let evidenceByItem: [ItemEvidence]; let minimumEvidenceCount: Int }
interfaces.notes: minimumEvidenceCount = 2 same-type-or-region data points before a suggestion visibly shifts.

interfaces.name: LearningHistoryReader
interfaces.signature: protocol LearningHistoryReader { func snapshot(for tripType: TripType, regionOrZoneId: String, context: ModelContext) throws -> LearningHistorySnapshot }
interfaces.notes: Always recomputes fresh from raw ReviewItemOutcome rows on trips where didHappen == true; never an incremental cache.

interfaces.name: isWithinFreeRetentionWindow
interfaces.signature: func isWithinFreeRetentionWindow(tripId: UUID, tripDate: Date, allTripDatesById: [UUID: Date], isPaidEntitled: Bool) -> Bool
interfaces.notes: Relationship-free free-tier lock check; must be callable from TripCard's body with zero perceptible cost.

interfaces.name: TabRoute
interfaces.signature: enum TabRoute: Hashable { case tripList, tripDetail(UUID), review(UUID), insights, settings, paywall }
interfaces.notes: Independent NavigationPath per tab, reset to root on cold relaunch.

interfaces.name: DeepLinkRouter
interfaces.signature: protocol DeepLinkRouter { func resolve(_ intent: PendingNavigationIntent, context: ModelContext) -> DeepLinkResolution }
interfaces.notes: Prevents racing entry points (notification, widget, Siri) from independently mutating navigation state.

interfaces.name: ToastCenter
interfaces.signature: @Observable final class ToastCenter { func show(_ message: ToastMessage) }
interfaces.notes: One implementation, used for both the changed-list moment and the trip-not-found fallback, different copy only.

interfaces.name: ColorStory
interfaces.signature: enum ColorStory: CaseIterable { case hotArid, tropicalHumid, temperateMild, coldContinental, alpine, mediterranean; func hexPair() -> (primary: String, secondary: String); func textColor(onLuminance: Double) -> Color }
interfaces.notes: Pure function of climate zone + season; formula-driven contrast per design_discussion's locked hex values.

interfaces.name: WidgetSnapshotPublisher
interfaces.signature: protocol WidgetSnapshotPublisher { func publish(_ snapshot: WidgetSnapshot) async }
interfaces.notes: Debounced ~1-2s over inactivity, then WidgetCenter.shared.reloadTimelines.

interfaces.name: EntitlementStore
interfaces.signature: @MainActor protocol EntitlementStore: AnyObject { var current: EntitlementState { get }; func start() async; func refresh() async }
interfaces.notes: Long-lived StoreKit 2 Transaction.updates listener, never a one-shot launch check. Offline grace window biases toward preserving unlocked access.

interfaces.name: AddPackingItemIntent
interfaces.signature: struct AddPackingItemIntent: AppIntent { @Parameter var itemName: String; func perform() async throws -> some IntentResult }
interfaces.notes: Lives in main app target only, calls domain services directly, targets most imminent upcoming trip, clean spoken failure at zero trips.

interfaces.name: NotificationScheduler
interfaces.signature: protocol NotificationScheduler { func scheduleReviewNudge(for tripId: UUID, at date: Date) }
interfaces.notes: Best-effort only, generic copy, permission denial never blocks core flow.

interfaces.name: regenerateSuggestedItems
interfaces.signature: func regenerateSuggestedItems(existing: [PackingItem], result: GenerationResult) -> [PackingItem]
interfaces.notes: Rewrites suggested rows only. Keeps checked state when name and reason are unchanged; never touches custom rows.

interfaces.name: AccessibilityCollapseAdapter
interfaces.signature: func collapsedHeaderStyle(colorStory: ColorStory, dynamicTypeSize: DynamicTypeSize, increaseContrast: Bool, reduceTransparency: Bool) -> HeaderRenderStyle
interfaces.notes: One shared 'collapse to flat/simple' mechanism reused across Dynamic Type XXL, Increase Contrast, and Reduce Transparency. layout and backgroundColors are set independently based on which trigger(s) are active.

interfaces.name: PersistenceBootstrap
interfaces.signature: func makeModelContainer() throws -> ModelContainer
interfaces.notes: Builds VersionedSchema (SchemaV1)-backed container from first commit. Failure surfaces a full-bleed persistence-error state, never a crash.

interfaces.name: TripStatus/didHappen
interfaces.signature: OPEN: Codex proposes `enum TripStatus { planned, completed, didNotHappen }` on a value-type trip snapshot; Claude proposes `var didHappen: Bool` directly on the @Model Trip. Pick one.
interfaces.notes: Both agree the semantics (soft-exclude, structurally filtered out of learning queries, never a delete) — only the representation differs. Must resolve next round.

interfaces.name: PackingItem/PackingItemArtifact
interfaces.signature: OPEN: Codex's `PackingItemArtifact` (value type, part of a persisted PackingListArtifact) vs Claude's `PackingItem` (@Model class with suggestionReason/isRecentlyChanged fields directly on the row). Pick one.
interfaces.notes: Both agree reason+changed-flag must be frozen at generation/regeneration time and never live-recomputed; only where that frozen data physically lives differs.

interfaces.name: ReviewOutcome shape
interfaces.signature: OPEN: Codex's ReviewOutcomeSnapshot/ReviewedItemOutcome + ItemUsageOutcome enum (used/unused/wishedPacked) vs Claude's Review/ReviewItemOutcome (@Model, wasUsed: Bool) + separate wishIPacked: String? field on Review. Pick one.
interfaces.notes: Functionally equivalent; needs one canonical shape so review UI and learning-history builder agree on a type.

interfaces.name: GenerationEngine contract
interfaces.signature: OPEN: Codex's `PackingListGenerating.generate(trip:climate:history:previous:) -> PackingListArtifact` vs Claude's `GenerationEngine.generate(input: GenerationInput) -> GenerationResult`. Both agree: pure, synchronous, non-async, zero SwiftData/UI dependency, zero LLM.
interfaces.notes: Naming/shape must converge; the 'must stay synchronous' rule is already locked and non-negotiable.

interfaces.name: ClimateNormal/ClimateSummary
interfaces.signature: OPEN: Codex's ClimateSummary (regionKey, month, averageHighC/LowC, PrecipitationBand, copyLabel) vs Claude's ClimateNormal (regionOrZoneId, month, averageHighC/LowC, averagePrecipitationMM, notes) + ClimateCatalog protocol. Similar shape, different field names/precision.
interfaces.notes: Both agree: bundled JSON, loaded once in-memory, CI test asserts 12-month completeness per region/fallback zone, UI copy always 'historical average' never forecast.

interfaces.name: isWithinFreeRetentionWindow / HistoryAccessPolicy
interfaces.signature: func isWithinFreeRetentionWindow(tripId: UUID, tripDate: Date, allTripDatesById: [UUID: Date], isPaidEntitled: Bool) -> Bool
interfaces.notes: Both agree this must be relationship-free and take only id+date projections plus entitlement state, never fault in items/review.

interfaces.name: PendingNavigationIntent / DeepLinkRouter
interfaces.signature: enum PendingNavigationIntent { case openTrip(UUID); case openReview(UUID); case openSettings/openPaywall; case none }; protocol DeepLinkRouter { func resolve(_ intent: PendingNavigationIntent, context: ModelContext) -> DeepLinkResolution }; enum DeepLinkResolution { case route(TabRoute); case tripNotFound }
interfaces.notes: Agreed by both: single app-root value, tripNotFound drives the same ToastCenter used for the changed-list moment.

interfaces.name: NotificationScheduler/NotificationScheduling
interfaces.signature: protocol NotificationScheduler { func scheduleReviewNudge(for tripId: UUID, at date: Date) }
interfaces.notes: Agreed: best-effort only, generic copy, permission denial never blocks core flow.

interfaces.name: DeepLinkResolution
interfaces.signature: enum DeepLinkResolution: Equatable { case route(TabRoute); case tripNotFound }
interfaces.notes: Stale/deleted-trip deep links fail safely to Trip List and reuse the existing toast system, never crash/no-op.

interfaces.name: ToastMessage
interfaces.signature: struct ToastMessage: Equatable { let text: String; let style: ToastStyle }
interfaces.notes: Shared toast payload.

interfaces.name: ToastStyle
interfaces.signature: enum ToastStyle: Equatable { case info, success, warning }
interfaces.notes: Minimal shared toast style set.

interfaces.name: TripPhase
interfaces.signature: enum TripPhase { case upcoming, inProgressOrAwaitingReturn, awaitingReview, reviewed, didNotHappen }
interfaces.notes: Never persisted. Computed fresh every read via tripPhase(trip:now:), so it cannot go stale.

interfaces.name: tripPhase
interfaces.signature: func tripPhase(trip: Trip, now: Date) -> TripPhase
interfaces.notes: Pure, cheap; called wherever UI needs lifecycle state (trip card badge, detail header).

interfaces.name: precipitationBand
interfaces.signature: func precipitationBand(for normal: ClimateNormal) -> PrecipitationBand
interfaces.notes: Pure derivation, called by GenerationEngine, never persisted.

interfaces.name: applyGenerationResult
interfaces.signature: func applyGenerationResult(_ result: GenerationResult, to trip: Trip, context: ModelContext) -> [PackingItem]
interfaces.notes: Single write path for frozen suggestion facts. Matches suggested rows by name; unchanged reason keeps checked state and isRecentlyChanged=false; never touches isCustom rows.

interfaces.name: PackingItemSnapshot
interfaces.signature: struct PackingItemSnapshot: Codable, Equatable { let name: String; let category: PackingCategory; let quantity: Int; let isCustom: Bool; let reason: SuggestionReason? }
interfaces.notes: Derived on demand from PackingItem rows for export/share only, never separately persisted. Export strips reason entirely per standing privacy rule.

interfaces.name: EntitlementState
interfaces.signature: struct EntitlementState: Equatable { let isPremiumActive: Bool; let lastVerifiedAt: Date?; let graceWindowEndsAt: Date? }
interfaces.notes: Single entitlement gating snapshot.

interfaces.name: TripStatus (Codex's variant, OPEN)
interfaces.signature: enum TripStatus: String, Codable, CaseIterable { case planned, completed, didNotHappen }
interfaces.notes: Persisted on Trip.statusRaw in Codex's round-2 model. Contested by Claude — see TripPhase alternative below.

interfaces.name: TripPhase (Claude's variant, OPEN)
interfaces.signature: enum TripPhase { case upcoming, inProgressOrAwaitingReturn, awaitingReview, reviewed, didNotHappen }
interfaces.notes: Never persisted; computed via tripPhase(trip:now:) from endDate + review presence + didHappen, so it can't go stale. This is the alternative to Codex's persisted TripStatus — pick one next round.

interfaces.name: HeaderRenderStyle
interfaces.signature: struct HeaderRenderStyle: Equatable { let layout: HeaderLayoutVariant; let backgroundColors: [Color]; let textColor: Color }
interfaces.notes: RESOLVED (was the round-3 gate failure — undefined return type). backgroundColors has 2 elements for the normal gradient pair, or 1 when Increase Contrast/Reduce Transparency has flattened it to a single anchor color. Modeled as independent fields rather than a 3-case enum specifically because layout collapse and color flattening are separate accessibility settings that can both be active at once — a mutually-exclusive enum would force dropping one.

interfaces.name: HeaderLayoutVariant
interfaces.signature: enum HeaderLayoutVariant: Equatable { case full, collapsedBand }
interfaces.notes: Driven independently by Dynamic Type size (XXL collapses to a slim band with text moved below onto plain background). Independent axis from color flattening — the two settings can be on simultaneously.
